case_title: DANIEL M. SWEENEY ET AL VS. MANUEL MARTIR ET AL
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER SWEENEY, DANIEL M. MONZO, MARIA
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: MOTION TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (CERTIFIED MAIL AS TO MARTIR CONSTRUCTION CO.) FILED BY PETITIONER SWEENEY, DANIEL M. MONZO, MARIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DANIEL SWEENEY, MARIA MONZO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTURAL ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PETITIONERS ARE REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND JUDGMENT. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED.*** =(302/SRB)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Petition To Confirm Contractural Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Sweeney, 650-996-2178 Petitioner in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DANIEL SWEENEY, MARIA MONZO's Petition To Confirm Contractural Arbitration Award.

Petitioners' petition to confirm arbitration award is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Petitioners are required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and judgment. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported.*** =(302/SRB)

***After the calling of the case, Respondent Manuel Martir appears late at 10:13 am. After the conclusion of the calendar, the Respondent was told of the Court's ruling.***
